name: Cherry Waldorf Gelatin
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, pour boiling water over gelatin; stir until dissolved.
2. Add cold water and lemon juice; chill until partially set.
3. Fold in chopped apples, celery, and nuts.
4. Pour into lightly oiled 6-cup mold or 9-inch square baking pan.
5. Chill until set, 4 to 6 hours or overnight.
6. Unmold on lettuce leaves and garnish as desired.
